title: prostanthera ferricola
intro: Prostanthera ferricola is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the lemon myrtle or lemon ironwood, which is native to eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Prostanthera ferricola include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Prostanthera ferricola can be found in teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
